summary: Classified the five maintainer-ready PRs independently using the hydrated preflight artifact at main fc15c58715f4eafbd258abaeb0e90a715bd67f60. No merge_candidate is emitted because none has a complete merge preflight with fresh mergeability, resolved review-bot state, clean /review, and validation summary. No executable fix artifact is emitted because the non-risk PRs are useful contributor branches rather than replacement work, and #88908 is broad/high-risk enough to require maintainer judgment before automation.

actions.reason: Exact hydrated security-sensitive linked ref must be quarantined to central OpenClaw security handling without affecting unrelated PR classifications.
